commit.message:
[Explorer] E004 Phase 2: Refactor transaction proposals into reusable components (#252)

## Motivation

Implement [Phase 2 of E004 (Search by Safe
Address)](https://github.com/safe-research/safenet/blob/main/features/2026_03_09_search_proposals_by_safe_address.md#phase-2--transactionproposalslist-shared-component-parallel-with-phase-1)

## Summary
Extracted transaction proposal rendering logic into a new reusable
`TransactionProposalsList` component, reducing code duplication and
improving maintainability.

## Key Changes
- **New component**: Created `TransactionProposalsList.tsx` with:
- `TransactionProposalItem`: Renders individual proposal with link and
styling
- `TransactionProposalsList`: Generic list component with customizable
label, "Show More" button, and loading state
- **Refactored**: `RecentTransactionProposals` now uses
`TransactionProposalsList` internally, reducing its implementation from
23 to 11 lines
- **Added comprehensive tests**: New test file covering both components
with 13 test cases validating:
  - Label rendering with proposal counts
  - Show More button visibility and behavior
  - Loading state handling
  - Proposal item rendering

## Implementation Details
- `TransactionProposalsList` accepts configurable `label` and
`showMoreLabel` props for flexibility
- Supports optional `isLoadingMore` prop to disable button and show
loading indicator during pagination
- Maintains existing styling and link behavior from original
implementation
- Uses unique key combining `safeTxHash` and `epoch` to handle duplicate
transactions across epochs

https://claude.ai/code/session_01HEzqdBGXHjb9nUgXgUtcSn

Co-authored-by: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix(bingo): txs stuck en mempool — gas overrides + dedup cierre de rondas

Root cause (logs Railway 2026-03-10):
  1. cancelRound() no pasaba AMOY_GAS_OVERRIDES → gas por defecto insuficiente
  2. Recovery + room loops llamaban closeRound/cancelRound al mismo round
     simultáneamente → múltiples txs duplicadas en la cola de nonces
  3. 30/35 gwei < base fee actual de Amoy → todas las txs atascadas 180s timeout
  4. Wallet del operador quedó con cola de nonces bloqueada

Fixes:
- bingoService.cancelRound(): añade AMOY_GAS_OVERRIDES (igual que close/create)
- bingoSchedulerOnChain: Set _closingRounds previene cierre duplicado del mismo
  roundId por recovery y room loops corriendo en paralelo
- scripts/unstick-operator-wallet.js: script de emergencia para reemplazar
  txs stuck con auto-transferencias de 0 POL a gas alto (200 gwei)

Acción requerida en Railway:
  GAS_PRIORITY_FEE_GWEI=100
  GAS_MAX_FEE_GWEI=200

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Implements all 4 tasks of Milestone 2.3:
- Feed health monitoring with status tracking
- Pause/resume controls with persistence
- Error recovery with circuit breaker
- Performance metrics collection

feat: Phase 3 — Dynamic frontend driven by pathway config

- App.tsx: Dynamic ModuleRouter with lazy-loaded component registry,
  replacing individual hardcoded project routes with /:moduleSlug/:projectId
- Sidebar: Project nav items now driven by active pathway's modules
  from pathwayStore, with fallback to software_product defaults
- StagesStepper: Accepts optional stages prop from pathway config
- DesignSheetPanel: Accepts optional fieldConfigs prop, resolves values
  from named columns or fields_data JSONB
- Discovery: Wired to pathwayStore — fetches project, activates pathway,
  passes stages and sheet field configs to child components
- Home: Pathway picker UI (shown when multiple pathways exist),
  dynamic creation fields and presets from active pathway,
  sends pathway_id with project creation

All existing software_product behavior preserved — zero breaking changes.
Vite build passes clean with proper code splitting per module.

commit.message: [Explorer] Add epoch information page with key generation status tracking (#249) ## Summary This PR adds a new epoch information page to the explorer that displays current and staged epoch details, along with a historical view of epoch rollovers and their associated key generation status. ## Screenshots ## Key Changes ### New Pages & Components - **New `/epoch` route** with `EpochPage` component displaying: - Current active epoch and staged epoch cards with group IDs - Historical epoch rollover list with expandable details - "Load more" pagination for rollover history - **New epoch-related components**: - `EpochCard`: Displays epoch number, group ID, and optional rollover block - `EpochRolloverItem`: Shows epoch transition with expandable key generation details - `KeyGenStatusItem`: Displays key generation progress with validator participation lists ### New Hooks - `useEpochsState`: Fetches current/staged epoch state and group IDs - `useEpochRolloverHistory`: Manages paginated loading of epoch rollover events with cursor-based pagination - `useKeyGenDetails`: Fetches and tracks key generation status for a specific epoch ### Core Library Functions - **`loadEpochsState`**: Reads current epoch state including previous, active, staged epochs and rollover block - **`loadEpochGroupId`**: Retrieves group ID for a specific epoch - **`loadEpochRolloverHistory`**: Fetches `EpochStaged` events with pagination support - **`loadKeyGenDetails`**: Analyzes key generation events (committed, shared, confirmed, complained) to determine status (started, committing, sharing, confirming, finalized, or compromised) ### Shared Components - Extracted `ValidatorList` component to `@/components/common/ValidatorList.tsx` for reuse across transaction and epoch pages - Updated `SafeTxAttestationStatus` to use the shared `ValidatorList` component ### Contract Integration - Added `getEpochsState()` and `getEpochGroupId()` function calls to consensus contract ABI - Added `EpochProposed` and `EpochStaged` event definitions to consensus ABI - Added key generation event selectors (`COORDINATOR_KEY_GEN_SELECTORS`) for filtering coordinator events ### Settings & Utilities - Added `blocksPerEpoch` setting for computing key generation start blocks - Enhanced `getFromBlock` utility to accept optional `referenceBlock` parameter for flexible block range calculations ## Implementation Details - Key generation status is determined by analyzing event logs: if not compromised and confirmed count ≥ threshold, it's finalized - Epoch rollover history uses cursor-based pagination, fetching backward in time with `maxBlockRange` windows - Auto-refetch is disabled for finalized/compromised key generation states - Validator participation is displayed with visual indicators (✅ for confirmed, ⏳ for pending, ❌ for failed) https://claude.ai/code/session_01QAnNwPH2mpD5x29XccHc3x --------- Co-authored-by: Claude

commit.message:
fix(dex-liquidity): extract price observations before dedup in staging merge and DS fallback

DL yields pools provide pool metrics (TVL, volume) but never prices.
When CG/GT staged pools or DexScreener fallback pairs fingerprint-match
DL pools, the dedup correctly prevents double-counting TVL in
dex_liquidity but was also dropping their price observations — leaving
48% of tracked stablecoins without a dex_prices row despite having
discoverable DEX pools.

Move price observation extraction above the dedup `continue` in both
mergeStagedPools and fetchDsFallbackPools. Pool metrics dedup is
unchanged; only price data is rescued.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix VIES SOAP fault detection to prevent false negatives

like MS_MAX_CONCURRENT_REQ which caused valid VAT numbers to be
reported as invalid. Now detects all SOAP faults via <faultstring>.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(bingo): salas desactivadas — room loops arrancan inmediatamente sin esperar recovery

Root cause: start() esperaba recoverOpenRounds() secuencialmente antes de lanzar
los room loops. recoverOpenRounds() llamaba waitForVrfAndResolution() por cada ronda
abierta (timeout 10 min × 4 salas = 40 min). Durante ese tiempo _roomStates={}
y la API devolvía phase='waiting'/currentRoundId=null para todas las salas.

Fixes:
1. Room loops arrancan INMEDIATAMENTE en start() — ya manejan MaxOpenRoundsReached
   con 60s retry + closeExpiredOpenRounds(). No necesitan esperar recovery.
2. recoverOpenRounds() ya no espera VRF por cada ronda — bingoEventService
   auto-resuelve rondas cuando VrfFulfilled dispara. Elimina el bloqueo de 40 min.
3. Recovery corre en background paralelo (Promise chain) sin bloquear room loops.
4. Añade scripts/diag-bingo.js para diagnóstico de emergencia on-chain + DB.

commit.message:
Add SQL editor with syntax highlighting, autocompletion, and query formatter

Replace plain TextEditor with a custom NSTextView-based SQL editor featuring
token-based syntax highlighting (keywords, strings, comments, numbers, operators),
autocompletion from SQL keywords and database metadata (schemas, tables, columns),
and a Beautify button that formats queries with proper indentation and auto-quotes
mixed-case identifiers for PostgreSQL compatibility.

Also fix empty query results showing "Query executed successfully" instead of
column headers when a SELECT returns 0 rows — now resolves column names from
table metadata via information_schema.

New files:
- SQLFormatter.swift: Token-based SQL tokenizer and formatter
- SQLSyntaxColors.swift: Adaptive light/dark mode colors
- SQLTextStorage.swift: NSTextStorage subclass for live highlighting
- SQLCompletionProvider.swift: Completion candidates from keywords + DB metadata
- SQLEditorView.swift: NSViewRepresentable wrapping NSTextView

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: Phase 2 — Parameterize all services by PathwayConfig

All backend services now accept an optional PathwayConfig parameter
instead of using hardcoded constants. Routers load the pathway from
the project's pathway_id and pass it through to services.

- ai_service: build_system_prompt, build_greeting_prompt, and
  extract_sheet_fields use pathway.base_persona, stage prompts, and
  extraction_prompt
- discovery_service: next_stage uses pathway.stages ordering and
  required_fields; compute_confidence uses pathway.sheet_fields weights;
  update_sheet_from_conversation stores to named columns or fields_data
  JSONB depending on field type
- sheet_service: generate_blocks uses pathway.block_generation_prompt
  and validates categories against pathway.block_categories
- pipeline_service: recommend_pipeline and estimate_cost use
  pathway.domain_layers instead of hardcoded LAYER_OPTIONS
- All routers (discovery, blocks, pipeline, design_sheet, projects)
  resolve PathwayRegistry.get_or_default(project.pathway_id) and pass
  the pathway to service calls

Existing software_product pathway produces identical behavior — all
hardcoded values were already migrated to the pathway config in Phase 1.

commit.message:
Improve execute, code-review, acv, and system-review from session learnings

execute: add mandatory Step 1.25 baseline test run before any code changes (both
  sequential and team-based sections) — pre-existing failures must be documented
  before implementation starts, not discovered retroactively at validation time

code-review: replace hard-coded /core and /docs references with CLAUDE.md-first
  standards detection; add explicit pre-existing failure verification step (check
  execution report or git stash baseline before reporting a test failure as new)

acceptance-criteria-validate: when invoked as a background subagent, always write
  report to file and return path + verdict to caller; CLI output is not visible to
  the orchestrating agent

system-review: remove nonexistent .claude/commands/ references; update Context &
  Inputs to use execution report + code review as primary inputs; add Step 6
  Auto-Update Used Skills via worktree + PR — skill now creates a worktree of
  ~/projects/ai-dev-env, applies targeted SKILL.md improvements there, commits,
  pushes, and opens a GitHub PR; never edits ~/.claude/plugins/ directly

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

repository.name: ai-dev-env
repository.description: Claude Code dev skills collection
